ddls:
CREATE TABLE "olt_ons" (
  "olt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OLT */,
  "onu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ONU */,
  "pon_id" INTEGER /* PON ID assigned to the ONU */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ONU (e.g., active, inactive, emergency stop) */,
  "equalization_delay" INTEGER /* Equalization delay value for the ONU */,
  "laser_status" TEXT /* Current status of the ONU's laser (e.g., on, off) */,
  "emergency_stop_state" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ONU is in an emergency stop state */,
  "last_communication_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last communication between OLT and ONU */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("olt_id", "onu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "olt_id" INTEGER /* OLT ID that sent or received the message */,
  "onu_id" INTEGER /* ONU ID that sent or received the message */,
  "message_name" TEXT /* Name of the message (e.g., Ranging_time, Deactivate_PON_ID) */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function of the message */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the message (e.g., OLT → ONU, ONU → OLT) */,
  "trigger" TEXT /* Trigger for sending the message */,
  "number_of_times_sent" INTEGER /* Number of times the message was sent */,
  "effect_of_receipt" TEXT /* Effect of receiving the message on the ONU */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was sent or received */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the message (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "response_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a response is expected for the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_onu_id FOREIGN KEY ("onu_id") REFERENCES onu_status ("onu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_olt_id FOREIGN KEY ("olt_id") REFERENCES olt_status ("olt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "olt_status" (
  "olt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OLT */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the OLT (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last status update */,
  "uptime" INTEGER /* Total uptime of the OLT in hours */,
  "downtime_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any downtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("olt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "onu_status" (
  "onu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ONU */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ONU (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last status update */,
  "uptime" INTEGER /* Total uptime of the ONU in hours */,
  "downtime_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any downtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("onu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network administrator, operator, maintenance personnel) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Level of access the user has (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for operator, 3 for maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
